name: Keystone Acquisition Corp.
business: Keystone Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It intends to focus its search on companies in energy transition, critical minerals, shipbuilding, semiconductors, digital infrastructure, and digital assets sectors, but is not required to complete a business combination in these industries.

exposures.sentence: Semiconductors and Advanced Electronics: facilitating the localization of semiconductor manufacturing and supply chain operations through collaboration with global technology leaders
Digital Infrastructure and Data Centers: investing in energy-efficient, high-performance data centers and related digital infrastructure essential for AI, industrial automation, and cloud computing
Energy Transition and Critical Minerals: including exploration, processing, and advanced material technologies that support clean energy, electrification, and battery manufacturing
Energy Transition and Critical Minerals: including exploration, processing, and advanced material technologies that support clean energy, electrification, and battery manufacturing
Shipbuilding and Maritime Engineering: revitalizing U.S. shipbuilding capabilities through strategic partnerships and technology transfer from leading international shipyards, particularly from Korea

Digital Assets: establishing a forward-looking financial framework through the adoption of blockchain technologies designed to enhance capital efficiency, transaction transparency, and cross-border investment flexibility

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 21 months from the closing of this offering or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.

tamClaims.claim: Small modular reactor startups sourced $3.9 billion in funding in 2024, a tenfold year-over-year increase from 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Deloitte, data center growth is driving significant capital investment, with small modular reactor startups sourcing $3.9 billion in funding in 2024, a tenfold year-over-year increase from 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Total amount of domestic and foreign investments into the United States totals $9.6 trillion.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the White House, the total amount of domestic and foreign investments into the United States totals $9.6 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: Electricity demand in the United States is projected to grow by 25% from 2023-2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Berkeley Research Group and ICF, electricity demand in the United States is projected to grow by 25% from 2023-2030 after over twenty years of stagnant growth.

tamClaims.claim: Data centers built to sustain AI development will account for nearly half of the increase in electricity demand by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: BRG predicts that data centers built to sustain the development of AI will account for nearly half of this increase in electricity demand by 2030, and the United States will have to double the pace of new electricity generation installations to satisfy these demands.
